title: BuildCraft RF: ReFluxified
description: An addon that makes BuildCraft machines use and produce FE/RF.
body:
A small addon made for BuildCraft that makes machines added by it be able to use ForgeEnergy/RedstoneFlux.

Conversion ratio is configurable via config file, the default value is: 15RF -> 1MJ

 

Requires:

BuildCraft|Core (Included in BuildCraft)

MixinBooter (2.1.1+)

 

BuildCraft engines also produce RF and connect to energy pipes.
